preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)

featureFlags._doc: Runtime feature flags read at Electron startup. Do NOT rely on these for security-critical defaults — a stale version.json on an offline client stays at the shipped values. Security-critical changes must land as code pushes with a version bump.

notes:
v1.21.20: meta_dpa_setup — full catalog DPA retargeting tool surface. Closes the capability gap surfaced by the live ivory-ella incident (2026-05-04). Pre-existing retargeting tools (meta_prepare_retargeting, meta_promote_to_retargeting, meta-setup-retargeting) build a custom-audience around a single source ad — they do NOT accept catalog ID, product set ID, custom audience include/exclude arrays, frequency cap, attribution-window override, or {{product.*}} template variables. v1.21.20 ships the missing capability end-to-end: new MCP tool mcp__merlin__meta_dpa_setup with the full DPA parameter surface (catalogId, productSetId, includeAudienceIds[], excludeAudienceIds[], frequencyCapEvents/Days, attributionClickDays/ViewDays, dpaHeadline/dpaPrimaryText/dpaDescription/dpaCallToAction with {{product.*}} placeholder grammar, dailyBudget, campaignId/campaignName); new binary action meta-dpa-setup wired through main.go's router; new runMetaDPASetup handler in meta_dpa_setup.go (~280 LOC) that validates the catalog (Meta /<catalogId>?fields=id,name,product_count), resolves or creates the product set (idempotent — re-runs return the same id for 'Merlin - All Products'), validates each audience id via metaGetStrict (surfaces Meta's error_user_msg verbatim — a deleted audience id surfaces as 'Custom Audience X cannot be loaded'), applies sensible defaults (3/7d freq, 7d-click + 1d-view attribution, SHOP_NOW CTA, '{{product.name | titleize}}' headline), resolves target campaign (defaults to the auto-created Retargeting campaign; honors cmd.CampaignID > cmd.CampaignName overrides), validates the daily budget against cfg.MaxDailyAdBudget, then creates the ad set with full DPA targeting (custom_audiences + excluded_custom_audiences + product_audience_specs + frequency_control_specs + attribution_spec + promoted_object), creates the dynamic carousel creative with object_story_spec.template_data + format_option=carousel_images_multi_items, and creates the ad — all in PAUSED status (explicit-activation guards spend; flip via meta_activate_asset or Ads Manager). Also added: meta_dpa_setup → meta-dpa-setup mapping in INTENT_TOOL_TO_ACTION (mcp-approval-policy.js) so the spend-approval card fires before ad-set creation. Pinned by autocmo-core/meta_dpa_setup_test.go (9 tests covering Command struct fields, action router wiring, preflight checks, PAUSED-status guard, defaults, targeting shape, templated creative, idempotent product-set resolver, and audience-id validation). Tests: 218s Go suite green, 1057 JS green (was 1056; +1 from the auto-cross-check that flagged meta_dpa_setup needs an entry in INTENT_TOOL_TO_ACTION).\n\nv1.21.19: Klaviyo template-update resilience — single-call 429 retry + friendlier error messages. Two coordinated fixes from a live SaaS-readiness audit (2026-05-04). (1) klaviyoUpdateTemplateWithRetry — bulk-CREATE has retried inline since the v1.21.x POG 27-flow incident; UPDATE was bare-call only, so a single 429 in a multi-template loop forced the caller to re-invoke. New helper mirrors the create-with-retry pattern (single 35s sleep + one retry), wired into runKlaviyoTemplateUpdate. (2) friendlyKlaviyoError wraps the raw 'Klaviyo API HTTP <code>: <body>' format with one-line actionable remediation: 404 → 'template not found / wrong account', 401/403 → 're-run klaviyo-login (lacks templates:write)', 429-after-retry → 'pause ~60s before retrying', 5xx → 'transient, retry in a minute'. Unknown shapes pass through verbatim so we never silently hide unfamiliar failures. Pinned by autocmo-core/klaviyo_template_resilience_test.go (9 tests). Audit verdict — public mcp__merlin__klaviyo template-update path is verified end-to-end safe for the 51-template bulk loop and for re-pushing the 4 already-IPC-pushed templates (Klaviyo PATCH is idempotent, ~24s for 4 with rate-limit spacing, no duplicate templates, no flow detachment). Wave C scanForbiddenBrandWords + scanHallucinatedStat gates fire BEFORE the API call so re-running drift-out-of-policy content correctly refuses with `force=true` override. Audit also surfaced two follow-up items not shipping in this release: missing templates:read templates:write in Klaviyo OAuth scopes (works today via API key, will 403 when Phase 2 OAuth ships); no native bulk-update action (51-template loop is the canonical pattern today). Tests: 218s Go suite green.\n\nv1.21.18: Meta retargeting NOT_FOUND — surfaced + fixed at the root. Three coordinated fixes for the live user incident where every retargeting endpoint (meta-retarget / meta-setup-retargeting / meta_prepare_retargeting) blanket-failed with NOT_FOUND for ivory-ella while insights + audits worked fine. (1) Pixel brand-match in runMetaLogin — pre-fix this blindly picked pixels.Data[0] regardless of cmd.Brand, so multi-brand-on-one-account users had the wrong pixel id stamped into their per-brand vault at OAuth time. v1.21.16 fixed this for pages + ad accounts but missed pixels — the very resource every retargeting custom-audience and DPA path depends on. Mirror the page brand-match pattern: when cmd.Brand is non-empty, fuzzy-match via brandMatches() against pixel names; fall back to Data[0] only when no name match. (2) metaGetStrict helper — read-then-error wrapper that surfaces Meta's error_user_title + error_user_msg on non-2xx GETs. metaCopyWinnerToRetargeting (meta.go:431) and metaDuplicateAd (meta.go:1620) previously called metaGet then unmarshalled into a Creative struct, saw Creative.ID=='' (because the body was actually {error:{code:100,error_user_msg:…}}), and returned the generic 'cannot read creative from ad %s' — the field that says WHICH resource is missing was silently discarded. Both retargeting + duplicate paths now route through metaGetStrict so users see Meta's error_user_msg verbatim. v1.21.12 wired metaErrorPreview into metaPost / image-upload / video-upload / batch but never the metaGet-then-unmarshal path; this closes that gap. (3) Actionable error messages on missing prerequisites — 'metaPixelId is empty' now points at meta-discover (re-runs page/pixel/ad-account auto-discovery without re-OAuth and writes per-brand vault); 'retargeting campaign not found' now points at meta-setup-retargeting (creates audiences) → meta-setup (creates campaign trio). Users self-recover from a known config gap without source-code archeology. Pinned by autocmo-core/meta_pixel_discovery_test.go (5 tests covering the strict-helper contract, retargeting paths' migration, brand-match pattern, and actionable error messages). Tests: 218s Go suite green. 

v1.21.17: Mac brand-persistence RSI — fixes the live incident where Mac users were re-routed into brand setup on every relaunch. Three reinforcing root causes addressed in one patch. (1) `.merlin-state.json` (which holds activeBrand) was written ONLY to ContentDir (~/Merlin) — a folder some users moved, renamed, had nuked by macOS Optimize Storage, or excluded from backups. New REDUNDANT writes: every state mutation lands in BOTH ContentDir AND StateDir (~/Library/Application Support/Merlin), with reads merging by `_ts` timestamp. Either alone is sufficient to skip re-onboarding. (2) Brand-existence scan only checked one path; misses brands stranded in legacy paths (~/Documents/Merlin from pre-1.0 installs, ~/Library/Application Support/Merlin from pre-D1-split installs, or wherever `cwd` resolved differently for the binary on translocated DMG launches). New `discoverBrands()` scans every known path canonical-first, AND auto-recovers stranded brands by copying them to the canonical location so subsequent launches find them on the fast path. (3) `isFirstRun` had a single signal — `CLAUDE.md` existence in ContentDir. Bootstrap was async (`setTimeout(bootstrapWorkspace, 500)` after window paint), so a fast-clicking user OR a translocated DMG with a read-only source path that silently failed `cp -Rn` could leave CLAUDE.md missing — and EVERY relaunch then mis-classified as a fresh install. New `isReturningUser()` checks FIVE independent signals (state file, CLAUDE.md, brand discovery, vault, config). False (true first-run) requires ALL five missing. Bootstrap is now SYNCHRONOUS-and-VERIFIED via `fs.cpSync` (Node-native, no platform-specific cp/robocopy callback chain), runs BEFORE createWindow so the ready-to-show handler can never race it, and verifies CLAUDE.md landed post-copy with a loud `appendErrorLog` on failure. Also: `.merlin-state.json` and `.merlin-threads.json` added to `version.json` preserve list so `/update` can't vaporize chat bubble cache or activeBrand. Three append-only logs (.merlin-errors.log, activity.jsonl, .merlin-audit.log) now route through unified rotating helpers — every appendFileSync outside `appendErrorLog` / `appendActivityLog` / `appendAudit` is a CI failure (source-scan in app/log-rotation.test.js). Tests: app/mac-persistence.test.js (15 new), app/log-rotation.test.js (5 new), all 1056 existing JS tests still green. Skip-this-version-if: you're not on Mac AND you've never reported this issue (Win/Linux unchanged in observable behavior; the redundancy + multi-path scan are pure-additive).

v1.21.16: Cancel UX + chat gallery + Meta integration completeness — five coordinated fixes responding to live user reports. (1) Escape-cancel now actually stops the SDK turn. Pre-fix it called only `merlin.stopGeneration()` which signaled the next-turn generator without aborting the in-flight query, so late text_delta events kept arriving, opened a stale 'half' bubble, and that bubble absorbed the NEXT user turn's tokens — the two-conversations-in-one-bubble bug. Now Escape calls `merlin.abortActiveQuery()` (the real interrupt), marks the live bubble dataset.canceled='true' so any racing tokens drop, calls `clearStatusLabel()` so the 'TALKING TO META' pill clears, and content_block_start opens a fresh bubble when prior was canceled. (2) Chat-gallery partial-render v2: dropped `background:#000` from `.merlin-artifact img/video` (same trap as v1.21.14's gallery-viewer fix), gated IMG opacity behind a data-loaded='true' flag, and added a shimmer ::before that sits in place during the load window. The renderer's gallery hook attaches load+error listeners that flip the flag. Pre-fix slow CDN responses left half-decoded scanlines stuck in the chat with a sharp black band where the rest should have been. (3) Streaming prefix cache reuses cached HTML across frames — pre-fix it stored prefixHtml but never read it, re-parsing the full prefix every frame (DOMPurify ran over a ~5KB dashboard reply 30-60× per second). Fix: extend cached prefix only with the delta since the previous frame, ~80% less markdown+sanitize work per frame on long streams. (4) Meta integration completeness — bulk-push and single-ad push now honor `cmd.CampaignID` and `cmd.CampaignName` via a new `resolveTargetCampaign` helper (was forced to auto-create a fresh Testing campaign every time). meta_launch_test_batch + meta_launch_test_ad zod schemas now accept campaignId. meta_scale_winner now routes to `meta-duplicate` (was silently no-op-routing to `meta-warmup` which is the API-permissions-ladder action — ad spend went nowhere). Image upload, video upload, and batch sub-response errors now route through `metaErrorPreview` so error_user_title + error_user_msg get surfaced (was raw body / 200-char truncation; sibling miss from the v1.21.12 NOT_FOUND opacity fix). (5) runMetaLogin now accepts *Command and brand-matches pages + ad accounts — pre-fix it blindly picked accts.Data[0]/pages.Data[0], so users with multiple Meta pages on one account had the wrong page stamped into their per-brand vault scope at OAuth time. Every subsequent push for the wrong-paged brand returned NOT_FOUND on downstream resources (catalog/pixel/audience that belonged to the OTHER page). Fix: when cmd.Brand is non-empty, fuzzy-match via brandMatches() against AllAccounts + AllPages and prefer those over Data[0]. Falls back to Data[0] when no name match (legacy behavior). Refine flow now emits artifact bundle so the chat gallery renders; merlin-content SKILL adds a 'Mandatory post-tool: echo gallery block verbatim' instruction so Claude stops paraphrasing variants as inline backticked paths. Pinned by app/v1-21-16-bundle.test.js (14 tests). Tests: 219s Go suite green, 1036 JS green (was 1022; +14 new). Bundles v1.21.15 Mac DMG-staple fix (CI-only) and earlier tonight's fixes back to v1.21.11.
whatsNew: Catalog DPA retargeting is now a first-class tool. New `mcp__merlin__meta_dpa_setup` accepts everything a real DPA push needs: catalog ID, product set ID (auto-creates 'All Products' if omitted), custom audience include/exclude arrays, frequency cap (default 3/7d), attribution window override (default 7d-click / 1d-view), and dynamic carousel templates with {{product.name}}, {{product.price}}, {{product.url}} placeholders. Always creates the ad set in PAUSED — explicit activation gates spend. The pre-existing retargeting tools (warm-cohort audiences from a single source ad) stay where they are; this is the catalog-DPA path the schema couldn't reach before.

Klaviyo template-update is now resilient to a single rate-limit hit. If a multi-template push catches a 429 mid-flight, the binary now sleeps 35s and retries once before failing the call — same resilience the bulk-create path has had since v1.21.x. And when something does fail, you'll see a one-line actionable message (e.g. 'template not found — deleted, or wrong account' / 're-run klaviyo-login (token lacks templates:write)') instead of raw API JSON.

Meta retargeting works again on multi-brand setups. Pre-fix, users with two brands sharing one Meta account (e.g. Ivory Ella + Madchill) had the wrong pixel id stamped at OAuth time — every retargeting endpoint blanket-failed with NOT_FOUND because the audience tried to bind to a pixel that wasn't firing the brand's events. Now Merlin brand-matches on pixel name at OAuth time (matches what we already do for pages + ad accounts). If you're already affected, run `meta-discover` with the active brand — it re-picks the right pixel without re-OAuth and writes it to the per-brand config. Bonus: NOT_FOUND errors now surface Meta's exact error message (which resource is missing) instead of a generic 'cannot read creative' — saves you from bisecting via trial-and-error.

Mac users: brand setup now sticks across re-opens. We were re-prompting setup on every launch because activeBrand was written to a folder macOS could nuke during Optimize Storage, AND first-run detection had only one signal (CLAUDE.md presence) that failed the moment bootstrap raced the welcome flow. State now writes to TWO redundant locations, brand discovery scans every known path with auto-recovery for stranded brands, and the first-run gate has FIVE independent signals — any one means 'this user has set up before, route them to their brand, not onboarding.' Bootstrap is now synchronous and verified, no more async race window. Win/Linux unchanged.

Activity, error, and audit logs now rotate at their size cap (5MB / 1MB / 1MB respectively) so a long-lived install doesn't accumulate tens of MB of noise on disk. Source-scan in CI blocks any future appendFileSync that bypasses the rotating helper — every log write must go through appendErrorLog / appendActivityLog / appendAudit.

Pressing Escape during a turn now actually stops it. Previously the SDK kept streaming, your half-canceled bubble would absorb tokens from your NEXT message, and the 'TALKING TO META' status pill would never clear. Cancel is now snappy — the in-flight query aborts, the bubble freezes, and the next message opens fresh.

Generated images render as the fanned card stack (and click into the carousel) again. When you generate variants, Merlin's binary still emits the gallery block — but the model was paraphrasing it as inline backticked file paths instead of echoing the cards. Updated the content skill so Claude preserves gallery blocks verbatim, and refine flow now also emits its bundle. Plus images no longer get stuck half-rendered with a black band — they wait for full decode before appearing, with a shimmer in the meantime.

Meta integration completeness pass: bulk-push and single-ad push now accept campaignId / campaignName so you can land variants in an existing campaign instead of being forced to auto-create a fresh Testing one. meta_scale_winner actually scales now (was a silent no-op routing to the API-permissions warmup). Image / video / batch upload errors surface the missing resource name (Pixel / Page / Ad Account / Custom Audience) instead of a truncated raw body.

Multi-brand Meta page picker is fixed. If you have two Meta pages on one ad account (e.g. Madchill + Ivory Ella), Merlin now brand-matches at OAuth time so the right page lands in each brand's vault. Pre-fix it always picked the first page Meta returned, which silently bound the wrong page → every push for the misrouted brand failed with NOT_FOUND on a downstream resource (catalog/pixel/audience that belonged to the OTHER page).

Streaming chat is faster on long replies. The prefix-cache reuse path was a no-op pre-fix — the cached HTML was stored but never read, so DOMPurify re-sanitized the full prefix every frame. Now it only sanitizes the delta since the previous frame, ~80% less per-frame work on long dashboard / refinement responses.

Mac install no longer trips Gatekeeper on older Macs. If you were seeing 'Apple could not verify Merlin is free of malware' on a 2017-or-older Mac, re-download from merlingotme.com — the new DMG is fully notarized AND stapled, so it verifies offline without depending on Apple's CloudKit servers (which were the silent failure point on older Macs).

Image previews never get stuck on a half-rendered frame anymore. Pre-fix a slow CDN response could leave the gallery showing the top portion of an image with a sharp black band where the rest should be. Now Merlin waits for the FULL image to decode before showing it — you see a brief shimmer instead of a stuck partial frame.

Browsing images in the gallery + archive feels noticeably faster. Reduced the viewer's heavy backdrop blur from 28px to 12px (3× lower GPU cost per navigation), drop the blur entirely while you're flicking through the filmstrip, and decode archive thumbnails off the main thread. Most noticeable on 50+ card grids and on macOS Metal.

Archive tiles are clickable again, even when the thumbnail isn't cached. Pre-fix every tile rendering the sparkle placeholder was a dead pixel — clicking did nothing. Now clicking opens a metrics panel showing status, spend, impressions, CTR, ROAS, and purchases for that ad, plus a ↻ Refresh thumbnail from Meta button when no image is cached.

Stale Live status auto-detects + auto-refreshes. If your cached ads-live data is older than 4 hours, the Archive shows a 'Live ad data: Xh ago — refreshing…' chip and silently re-fetches from Meta in the background. Fixes the 'Anime is showing Live but isn't actually Live' case where a paused-on-Meta ad still rendered as Live in Merlin until you remembered to click ↻.

Image preview shows the actual generated image — not the reference photo overlaid on top. When using an edit model (the default for brands with a brand-manifest), the AI already places your design in the scene; the previous build then pasted the bare reference cutout on top, breaking both the chat preview AND the creative pushed to Meta. Now the composite step is skipped when the edit model has already incorporated the reference. Existing reference-on-scene composite path stays for text-to-image models (Flux, Seedream, Ideogram).

Meta push errors now tell you which asset is missing. Previously a NOT_FOUND on a stale Pixel / Page / Ad Account / Custom Audience returned an opaque `Object cannot be loaded` — Meta's own `error_user_msg` was being dropped by the binary's error parser. Now you see the exact resource name (`Pixel not found: 1234567890`) plus a one-click reconnect hint when it's a re-OAuth-fixable asset (Page / Pixel / Ad Account). The fix benefits every push path: single-creative push, multi-creative batch push, and bulk upload all share the same error parser.

Gallery viewer action buttons (★ keep / ✗ reject / 🗑 trash / ✕ close) are now clickable across the full button area, not just the icon. Pre-fix only the glyph itself accepted clicks; the surrounding 36×36 button bbox was inert because of a stale CSS direct-child selector chain. Pinned by a regression test so a future selector-tightening sweep can't bring it back.

Connect Shopify in one click from the Shopify App Store — no more typing your store URL in a modal. The new install flow is App Store-compliant (you click 'Add app' on apps.shopify.com → approve scopes → land back in Merlin Desktop with your store connected). Returning merchants who reconnect after a long gap no longer get stuck in the 'install loop' some hit on the previous flow.

Dashboard now shows NC-ROAS (revenue from first-time buyers ÷ ad spend) plus LTV, LTV:CAC, and payback in months — with a confidence label so a brand without enough cohort history sees 'no signal yet' instead of a fake $0. NC-ROAS uses Shopify's authoritative orders_count==1 field — not heuristics — so the number you see is the number Shopify says.

Plus from v1.21.11: currency-aware spending (EUR/GBP/AUD brands), international brand-name slugification (Lalí Cosmetics et al), `mcp__merlin__slack` for Monday-digest hand-off, faster chat scroll + voice transcription, and the Meta intent-tool spend-approval bypass closed.
